summary: Completed frontend testing of Quantity column feature in product variants section. All requested features verified working correctly: Quantity input field in Add New Variant form, Qty column header in variants table, quantity values displayed for each variant, and adding new variants with quantity values.
passed_tests: Quantity input field appears in Add New Variant form with data-testid='variant-quantity-input'
Qty column header appears in variants table
Quantity values are displayed for each variant in the table (e.g., 2, 0, 0, etc.)
Adding a new variant with size=3XL, color=PURPLE, quantity=25 works correctly
Variant added toast notification appears after adding variant
newVariant state includes quantity field (line 45 in ItemsPage.js)
Variants tab shows correct count of variants
Form resets after adding variant (quantity field clears)
Qty column displays numeric values correctly in table rows
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo account and products
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quantity column feature in product variants is fully implemented and working. Key implementation details: 1) newVariant state at line 45 includes quantity field, 2) Quantity input in Add New Variant form at lines 1612-1621 with data-testid='variant-quantity-input', 3) Qty column header at line 1645, 4) Quantity values displayed in table at line 1657, 5) handleSubmit creates inventory records when variant has quantity > 0 (lines 214-220). The feature allows users to specify initial stock quantity when creating new product variants.

quantity_input_field.location: Add New Variant form in Variants tab

add_variant_flow.result: Variant added to table with quantity value displayed

inventory_creation.trigger: When variant has quantity > 0 and item is saved

code_locations.qty_display: line 1657 - Quantity value in table row
